hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | grep -q 'git commit' && { uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/ 2>&1 && uv run ruff check src/ tests/ 2>&1; } || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.py$' && uv run ruff format "$f" || true; } 2>/dev/null || true
